assignments.name: security_report

parameters.content:
=== CUSTOM SECURITY NODE SCAFFOLD ===

This is a reusable security processing sub-workflow callable by any attack workflow via n8n's Execute Workflow node.

Input expected: { raw_input, context, workflow_id, node_id }

Modules (in order):
1. Input Signature Scan — 16 injection pattern families, returns score 0-100
2. Instruction Boundary Injection — wraps content in <untrusted_input> XML delimiters
3. Output Schema Validation — placeholder for JSON Schema checking
4. Tool Call Allow-listing — checks proposed tool against allow list
5. Semantic Anomaly Score — heuristic drift detection via keyword overlap
6. Execution Budget Check — call count vs budget limit
7. Trace Integrity Log — appends execution trace for audit

Output: security_report object + BLOCK/PASS verdict via NoOp terminals.

To use: Create an Execute Workflow node in any attack workflow and point it to this workflow.
